prompt: Rank these famous shipwrecks from shallowest to deepest

items.name: Vasa
items.fact: 32 m deep — sank in Stockholm harbor in 1628

items.name: Andrea Doria
items.fact: 73 m deep — sank off Nantucket in 1956

items.name: Lusitania
items.fact: 93 m deep — torpedoed off Ireland in 1915

items.name: Titanic
items.fact: 3,800 m deep — hit iceberg in N. Atlantic in 1912

items.name: USS Johnston
items.fact: 6,456 m deep — WWII destroyer, deepest wreck identified
